title: D4 module manifest
description: Machine-readable contract every D4 module repo carries at its root as manifest.json. d4-site-builder reads these to assemble client sites.

name.description: Module name, matching the repo name.

kind.description: site: the base template. core: infrastructure other modules depend on. feature: a selectable site feature.

description.description: Technical description, written for an agent matching modules to a client brief.

clientFacingSummary.description: Plain-language summary usable in a client proposal.

keywords.description: Terms a client brief might use that should select this module.

requires.description: Module name to semver range, e.g. {"d4-cms-core": ">=1.0.0"}. The builder auto-includes required modules.

optionalIntegrations.description: Modules this one enhances when present but does not need.

routes.description: URL paths this module adds. Two selected modules must not provide the same route.

nav.description: Nav entries the builder writes into src/config/nav.generated.ts.

importPath.description: Alias import path of a client component default export, e.g. @/modules/careers/admin/CareersEditor.

adminPanels.description: Dashboard panels the builder writes into src/config/admin-panels.generated.tsx. Requires d4-cms-core.

collections.description: Names of data collections (data/<name>.json) this module reads and writes.

lib.description: Importable paths this module offers to other modules or custom pages.

env.description: Environment variables the module reads. The builder writes these into the assembled site's .env.example.

npmDependencies.description: Package name to version range, merged into the assembled site's package.json dependencies.

from.description: Directory in the module repo, usually "files".

to.description: Destination relative to the site root, usually ".".

copy.description: Copy steps the builder performs, in order.

postAssemble.description: Free-form notes for humans and agents about what happens after copying.
